sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa tung thupha ngen dingin i kikhawm a,
Ama deihna i theih nangin hong hilh hi;
nencipna pan suakta-in i lung nuamta,
Phat un, Topa’n a mite mangngilh lo

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa in a gam a kipsak a puah dingin,
Eite hong sawl hong koppih hong makaih
Tua manin gal i zo, i kipatcil panin,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Galzo makaipa aw, Na min kong phat uh a,
Hong makaih lai in ci-in kong thuum uh
Bawlsiatna pan Na mite suakta sak inla,
Hong kiphat den tahen hong Honpa Na hi.
